This field indicates the highest stage indicator of a pressure ulcer in the last 7 days. A pressure ulcer is any lesion caused by pressure resulting in damage of underlying tissue. 0 = None; 1 = Stage 1; 2 = Stage 2; 3 = Stage 3; 4 = Stage 4; "-" = Unknown.
412 M2B M2B_STASIS_ULCER (M2B) Stasis Ulcers CHAR 1 Skin condition: ulcers - stasis ulcer. This field indicates the highest stage indicator of a stasis ulcer in the last 7 days. A stasis ulcer is an open lesion caused by poor circulation in
